title: Technoblade pig spawn egg🕊️
description:
Pig 1.25 egg texture become technoblade's skin.
Rest In Peace🕊️
body:
# Works only in 1.25+


## Disclaimer

 This recource pack make the pig spawn egg like technoglade skin's
 I’m not trying to profit from it since I’m just a guy who study and in his free time does these resource packs and watched at the times at technoblade's video.
 
  
 This is only a Tribute to our legend Technoblade.
 
 # Rest In Peace🕊️
